params.note: Low top-down, 64x64, 8 directions — maps use 32px tiles and a 64px character reads as ~2 tiles (per coordination/maps.json). 64px is the target body size.

style: detailed RPG pixel art inspired by Grave Seasons, realistic human proportions and expressive faces, naturalistic lighting and a varied lifelike color palette, soft dramatic shading, high detail, clean readable shapes; mature art for a teen-and-up audience, never childish or cutesy but not forced to be dark
